creator: mi@xxx.video-collage.com
text:
mkdist script dies with shell error. cp command gets empty
	(no) argument -- bug in the mkdist-script.

Fix: 

For now, uncomment the shift immediately following the IFS= line.

For a proper bugfix, contact the author of the program, please.
How-To-Repeat: 
	mkdist directory release # As per man-page
or
	mkdist --release=release directory # As per mkdist's usage message
